nodes.label: Runtime Error Screenshot: CommunicationsView HMR Failure
nodes.description: Next.js 16.1.3 (stale) Turbopack runtime error overlay captured in Safari. The error states that src/components/sanad/CommunicationsView.tsx was instantiated because src/app/page.tsx required it, but the module factory is not available — likely because the file was deleted during an HMR update. The call stack points to src/app/page.tsx line 17. The visible import context shows page.tsx importing ClientsView, InvoicesView, ScannerView (line 17, highlighted), CalendarView, StudentView, and TodayFocusView from @/components/sanad/*.
key_facts: Error type: Next.js Runtime Error — HMR module factory unavailable
Imports visible in page.tsx around line 17: ClientsView, InvoicesView, ScannerView, CalendarView, StudentView, TodayFocusView
CommunicationsView was likely deleted or renamed without updating the import in page.tsx
Call stack depth: 19 frames; top frame is src/app/page.tsx (17:1)
